scripts.build:desktop: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:web && pnpm build:server && pnpm build:electron
scripts.build:electron: rm -rf dist/server dist/web dist/canvases dist/samples && cp -r ../server/dist dist/server && echo '{"type":"module"}' > dist/server/package.json && cp -r ../web/dist dist/web && cp -r ../../packages/canvases dist/canvases && cp -r ../../packages/samples dist/samples && tsc -p tsconfig.json
